points: Architected and built new B2B-oriented features for the Reddit Android app from the ground up.
Developed the 'Trends' dashboard, enabling brands to monitor real-time keyword usage across subreddits, comments, and posts.
Authored comprehensive technical design documents for new feature experiments and platform improvements.
Conducted analytics audits and implemented robust experimentation frameworks for high-impact feature releases.
Rapidly prototyped and iterated on future Android implementations to validate product-market fit.
Maintained high code quality by implementing unit tests and squashing critical bugs with high efficiency.

brief: Premium home sound systems and wireless speakers.
points: Developed the next-generation Sonos app, enabling seamless high-fidelity music playback via WiFi connectivity.
Built intuitive interfaces for complex multi-room speaker system configuration and management.
Engineered a common internal SDK to unify multiple third-party music service integrations.
Collaborated on critical bug fixes and performance optimizations to maintain premium hardware-software synchronization.
Ensured platform stability through rigorous unit testing and automated UI testing using Robolectric and Compose UI Test.

brief: Advanced logistics and bypass solutions for the trucking industry.
points: Architected a green-field project providing digital tools for truck drivers to manage trips and cargo across the US.
Implemented modern Android standards including Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and Flow from day one.
Established CI/CD automated workflows for unit and UI testing to ensure rapid, reliable deployment cycles.
Provided technical mentorship to the team, documenting best practices for 'how' and 'why' new tools were implemented.
Led the effort to write 100% of the initial unit and UI testing suite for the project.

brief: Leading global media and technology platform with millions of concurrent users.
points: Engineered a 100% serverless mobile architecture for WorldStarHipHop, utilizing the full Firebase ecosystem to manage backend logic, data, and media for millions of users.
Architected real-time content delivery and user interactions using Cloud Firestore and Realtime Database to handle massive concurrent traffic spikes.
Leveraged Cloud Functions to implement server-side logic and automated triggers, eliminating the need for a traditional custom backend.
Managed global media distribution and storage using Firebase Storage, optimizing delivery for high-definition video content.
Implemented advanced user authentication, remote configuration, and dynamic feature flagging using the complete Firebase toolset.
Refactored the application into 100% Kotlin modules and migrated the DI framework from Dagger to Hilt to improve development velocity.
skills: Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Functions, Storage, Analytics, Remote Config)

brief: The first Colombian unicorn and a leader in LATAM fintech.
points: Integral member of the RappiPay team, developing the RappiCard—the first credit card to introduce numberless cards and in-app management in LATAM.
Optimized logistics features including delivery direction prediction algorithms and enhanced order placement screens.
Scaled financial features to provide credit access to hundreds of thousands of first-time users.
Maintained a fast-paced development cycle, delivering critical features and bug fixes in a high-growth startup environment.

brief: Last-mile micro-mobility startup providing scooter rentals in LATAM.
points: Developed a suite of apps including a warehouse management system and street maintenance tools for scooter fleets.
Engineered a low-level BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) library for standardized scooter communication used across all company apps.
Integrated Firebase ML Kit to automate scooter inventory checks via image recognition for warehouse personnel.
Built a custom high-performance QR Scanner utilizing CameraX and Firebase Vision APIs.
Led extensive refactoring efforts to transition the 'weekend-born' prototype into a scalable, mature startup architecture.

brief: Shared van shuttle service for urban commuting.
points: As the first and sole mobile developer, took full ownership of the mobile ecosystem for a growing startup.
Successfully rewrote both the Rider and Driver applications from scratch in 2 months, implementing modern MVP and Clean Architecture.
Transitioned the codebase from an external agency's prototype to a profitable, scalable in-house product.
Integrated complex features including real-time GPS tracking via Google Location Services and payments via Stripe.

brief: The largest e-commerce ecosystem in Latin America.
points: Built a foundational expertise in scalable Android code and rigorous unit testing methodologies.
Enhanced the SYI (Sell Your Item) flow, optimizing the core revenue-generating path for the platform.
Managed the AutoPlaza and TuCarro apps, utilizing Android Flavors to share a single codebase across different regional brands.
Played a key role in migrating house rental listings into the main MercadoLibre ecosystem following a major acquisition.
